subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1913-05-07
subcodes.first_line: When I was young they would light ten candles and at the range of a very long distance I would put out the lights one after another without missing one.
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @youth and pre-ministry of Abdu'l-Baha, @excellence; distinction, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline
